functions.name: AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow
functions.signature: MBS( "AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow"; AVSession; WindowRef; X; Y; W; H )
functions.description: Adds a preview area to the window.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: WindowRef
parameters.description: Window Reference is the unique OS level window ID. You can obtain this by using the Window.FindByTitle or Window.FindByIndex functions. Pass zero to access the frontmost window.

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: The x coordinate.

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: The y coordinate

parameters.name: W
parameters.description: The width of the preview area.

parameters.name: H
parameters.description: The height of the preview area.

examples.label: Start preview:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow";
$Session
; Get(WindowName); 50; 200; 320; 240)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.StartPreview
";
$Session
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow"; $Session; Get(WindowName); 50; 200; 320; 240)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StartPreview"; $Session)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.AddPreviewWithControl
functions.description: Adds a preview area to the window using placeholder control.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: WindowRef
parameters.description: Window Reference is the unique OS level window ID. You can obtain this by using the Window.FindByTitle or Window.FindByIndex functions. Pass zero to access the frontmost window.

parameters.name: ControlName
parameters.description: The name of the control on your FileMaker form. e.g. you can place a rectangle there to define the position.

examples.label: Add preview to our layout:
examples.text_code:
# go to the right layout
Go to Layout [ “Webcam” (LiveStream) ; Animation: None ]
New Record/Request
# pause to actually show the new layout
Pause/Resume Script [ Duration (seconds): ,3 ]
# place preview on the control
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.AddPreviewWithControl";
$$SessionID
; 0; "Preview" ) ]
# Start video stream
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.StartPreview
";
$$sessionID
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> go to the right layout</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="SelectedLayout"/>
    <Layout id="99999" name="Webcam"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> pause to actually show the new layout</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,3 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> place preview on the control</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.AddPreviewWithControl"; $$SessionID; 0; "Preview" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Start video stream</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.StartPreview"; $$sessionID ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.AudioDeviceCount
functions.description: Queries number of audio devices found by the plugin. Calling this function will rebuild the device list, so you can query it with the other functions like AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo .

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

functions.name: AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo
functions.description: Queries details about audio device.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index of the device from 0 to AVRecorder.AudioDeviceCount -1 or the name or ID of the device.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: Which value to return. Can be ID, Name, Description, Index. On Mac can also be manufacturer, modelID, transportType, connected, inUseByAnotherApplication or suspended.

examples.label: Enumerate audio devices:
examples.text_code:
# list audio devices
Set Variable [
$count
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.AudioDeviceCount
";
$recorder
)]
If [
$count
> 0]
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:0]
Loop
# next
New Record/Request
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Index
;
$index
]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::ID
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "ID")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Name
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "Name")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Description
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "Description")]
If [
MBS
("
SystemInfo.isMacOSX
")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Manufacturer
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "manufacturer")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::ModelID
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "modelID")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::TransportType
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "transportType")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Connected
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "connected")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::inUseByAnotherApplication
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "inUseByAnotherApplication")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::suspended
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "suspended")]
End If
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Type
;  "Audio"]
Commit Records/Requests []
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:
$index
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$count
=
$index
]
End Loop
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> list audio devices</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceCount"; $recorder)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$count</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$count > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$index</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Index"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "ID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Name")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Name"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Description")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Description"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("SystemInfo.isMacOSX")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "manufacturer")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Manufacturer"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "modelID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ModelID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "transportType")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="TransportType"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "connected")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Connected"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "inUseByAnotherApplication")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="inUseByAnotherApplication"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AudioDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "suspended")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="suspended"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>"Audio"</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Type"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$index + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$count = $index</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType
functions.description: Queries authorization status for audio/video recording. Returns the client's authorization status for accessing the underlying hardware that supports a given media type. The possible values are:

parameters.name: MediaType
parameters.description: The media type, can be video or audio.

examples.label: Check status and request access:
examples.text_code:
If [
MBS
("IsMacOS") ]
Set Variable [
$status
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType"; "video" ) ]
If [
$status
= "NotDetermined" ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.RequestAccessForMediaType
"; "video" ) 	]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
Else If [
$status
= "Denied" ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Can't access camera" ; "Please go to system preferences, privacy and enable camera for FileMaker." ]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
Else If [
$status
= "Authorized" ]
# this is fine!
End If
Else If [
MBS
("IsWindows") ]
# nothing needed
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>If [ MBS("IsMacOS") ] 
	Set Variable [ $status ; Value: MBS( "AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType"; "video" ) ] 
	If [ $status = "NotDetermined" ] 
		Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS( "AVRecorder.RequestAccessForMediaType"; "video" ) 	] 
		Exit Script [ Text Result:    ] 
	Else If [ $status = "Denied" ] 
		Show Custom Dialog [ "Can't access camera" ; "Please go to system preferences, privacy and enable camera for FileMaker." ] 
		Exit Script [ Text Result:    ] 
	Else If [ $status = "Authorized" ] 
		# this is fine!
	End If
Else If [ MBS("IsWindows") ] 
	# nothing needed
End If</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.AvailableReactionTypes
functions.description: Returns a list of reaction types which can be passed to performEffectForReaction. The list may differ between devices, or be affected by changes to active format. Requires macOS 14.0 or iOS 17.0. Returns empty list on older system versions.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Try it on macOS 14.0:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.AvailableReactionTypes";
$$AVSession
)
Example result:
ReactionBalloons
ReactionFireworks
ReactionThumbsUp
ReactionRain
ReactionThumbsDown
ReactionLasers
ReactionConfetti
ReactionHeart
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.AvailableReactionTypes"; $$AVSession )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.CanPerformReactionEffects
functions.description: Indicates whether reactions can be performed on a particular AVCaptureDevice. This requires reactionEffectsEnabled to be true, as well as using a AVCaptureDeviceFormat with reactionEffectsSupported. This readonly property returns 1 when resources for reactions are available on the device instance. When true, calls to AVRecorder.PerformEffectForReaction will render on the video feed, otherwise those calls are ignored. It is key-value observable. Requires macOS 14.0 or iOS 17.0.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Try it:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.CanPerformReactionEffects";
$$AVSession
)
Example result:
ReactionBalloons
ReactionFireworks
ReactionThumbsUp
ReactionRain
ReactionThumbsDown
ReactionLasers
ReactionConfetti
ReactionHeart
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.CanPerformReactionEffects"; $$AVSession )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto
functions.description: Captures a still image. The image is returned a JPEG image as container value on Mac and BMP on Windows. Added Windows support with plugin version 6.5. May require running the preview for some time as we capture only current preview frame on Windows. If no frame is yet available, the function returns an error. If you need content detection, you can always get current frame with AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto and pass it to OCR.SetImage for text recognition or Barcode.Detect to find different barcodes.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The file name for the jpeg image.

examples.label: Init and Capture photo:
examples.text_code:
#Start session
Set Variable [
$capture
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.Init
" )]
#Pick first video device
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.SetVideoDevice
";
$capture
; 0 )]
#Start preview
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.StartPreview
";
$capture
)]
#Wait a bit to have camera get up and running
Pause/Resume Script [Duration (seconds): ,5]
#Take a picture
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto";
$capture
)]
#Put in container
Set Field [
test::Test
;
$r
]
#Cleanup
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.Release
";
$capture
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Start session</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.Init" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$capture</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Pick first video device</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.SetVideoDevice"; $capture; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Start preview</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StartPreview"; $capture)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Wait a bit to have camera get up and running</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,5</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Take a picture</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto"; $capture )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Put in container</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    <Field table="test" id="99999" name="Test"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.Release"; $capture )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Take picture and store it in record:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$image
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto";
$$SessionID
) ]
# state of last function in same script: 0 = no error, 1 = got error
If [
MBS
("IsError") ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Sorry" ;
$image
]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
End If
If [ not IsEmpty (
LiveStream::Image
) ]
New Record/Request
End If
Set Field [
LiveStream::Image
;
$image
]
Set Field [
LiveStream::Description
; "Webcam" ]
Commit Records/Requests [ With dialog: Off ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto"; $$SessionID) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> state of last function in same script: 0 = no error, 1 = got error</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Sorry" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$image </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result:    </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> not IsEmpty ( LiveStream::Image ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$image </Calculation>
    <Field table="LiveStream" id="99999" name="Image "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>"Webcam" </Calculation>
    <Field table="LiveStream" id="99999" name="Description "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.ClosePreview

    </Repetition>

  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.CurrentQRCode
functions.description: Queries current QRCode. If you query this, a flag is cleared, which will start again the trigger to call script if new code is detected. Returns empty if no QRCode is detected.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Update field with current code:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.CurrentQRCode"; AVRecorder::Session) </Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder" id="99999" name="Barcode "/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.EncoderCount
functions.description: Queries number of encoders found by the plugin.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Query available encoders:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$a
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.Init
") ]
Set Variable [
$count
; Value:
MBS
("AVRecorder.EncoderCount";

functions.name: AVRecorder.EncoderInfo
functions.description: Queries details about video encoders. Windows 10 includes usually the following encoders for video: WMVideo8 Encoder DMO, WMVideo9 Encoder DMO, MSScreen 9 encoder DMO, DV Video Encoder, MJPEG Compressor.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index of the device from 0 to AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount -1 or the name or ID of the device.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: Which value to return. Can be ID, Name, Description, Index. On Mac can also be manufacturer, modelID, transportType, connected, inUseByAnotherApplication or suspended.

functions.name: AVRecorder.GetAutomaticallyAdjustsVideoMirroring
functions.description: Queries whether automatically mirroring is enabled. For some session configurations, video data flowing through the connection will be mirrored by default. When the value of this property is 1, the value of videoMirrored may change depending on the configuration of the session, for example after switching to a different device input. The default value is 1.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

functions.name: AVRecorder.Init
functions.description: Starts a new recording session. You need to call init to get a new session ID which is needed for all other AVRecorder calls. Please call AVRecorder.Release when you are done with recording.

examples.label: Initialize and pick first camera:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$$SessionID
; Value:

("AVRecorder.Init") ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Sorry" ;
$$SessionID
]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
End If
If [
MBS
("
AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount
";
$$SessionID
) = 0 ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Please buy a camera" ]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
End If
# pick first camera
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.SetVideoDevice
";
$$SessionID
; 0) ]

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$index</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Index"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "ID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Name")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Name"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Description")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Description"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("SystemInfo.isMacOSX")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "manufacturer")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Manufacturer"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "modelID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ModelID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "transportType")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="TransportType"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "connected")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Connected"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "inUseByAnotherApplication")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="inUseByAnotherApplication"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "suspended")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="suspended"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>"Video"</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Type"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$index + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$count = $index</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.Release"; $recorder)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.PerformEffectForReaction
functions.description: Triggers a specified reaction on the video stream. The reactionType requested must be one of those listed in AVRecorder.AvailableReactionTypes or an exception will be thrown. Performing a reaction when AVRecorder.CanPerformReactionEffects is false is ignored, and VoIP applications are encouraged to transmit and display such reactions outside of the video feed. Requires macOS 14.0 or iOS 17.0.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: reactionType
parameters.description: Indicates which reaction to perform.

examples.label: Perform balloon reaction:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.PerformEffectForReaction"; $$AVSession; "ReactionBalloons" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.ReactionEffectGesturesEnabled
functions.description: A function indicating whether gesture detection will trigger reaction effects on the video stream. Gesture detection will only run when the device's activeFormat.reactionEffectsSupported is also true, which will be reflected by AVRecorder.CanPerformReactionEffects . This property changes to reflect the Gestures state in Control Center. Clients can call AVRecorder.PerformEffectForReaction independently of whether gesture detection is enabled, reaction effects from either source will be intermixed. Requires macOS 14.0 or iOS 17.0. Returns 0 on older system versions.

examples.label: Check whether reaction gestures are enabled:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.ReactionEffectGesturesEnabled" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$enabled</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.ReactionEffectsEnabled
functions.description: Whether reaction effects are enabled. A class property indicating whether the application is suitable for reaction effects, either by automatic gesture detection, or by calls to performEffectForReaction(). Reactions are only rendered when the device's activeFormat.reactionEffectsSupported is also true, which will be reflected by canPerformReactionEffects when the feature is both enabled and supported. On macOS, Reaction Effects are enabled by default for all applications. On iOS, Reaction Effects are enabled by default for video conferencing applications (apps that use "voip" as one of their UIBackgroundModes). Non video conferencing applications may opt in for Reaction Effects by adding the following key to their Info.plist: <key>NSCameraReactionEffectsEnabled</key> <true/> Requires macOS 14.0 or iOS 17.0. Returns 0 on older system versions.

examples.label: Check whether reactions are enabled:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.ReactionEffectsEnabled" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$enabled</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.RequestAccessForMediaType
functions.description: Requests permissions for media type. Requests access to the underlying hardware for the media type, showing a dialog to the user if necessary. May show a dialog to user, so call early when the features are needed. Check with AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType , whether you are allowed. The application (FileMaker or runtime) may need to have Microphone and Camera usage strings in info.plist as well as entitlements used for code signing for those. FileMaker Pro 18.0.3 or newer does have those, but for a runtime or iOS SDK based app you may need to add that yourself.

parameters.name: MediaType
parameters.description: The media type, can be video or audio.

examples.label: Check status and request access:
examples.text_code:
If [
MBS
("IsMacOS") ]
Set Variable [
$status
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType
"; "video" ) ]
If [
$status
= "NotDetermined" ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.RequestAccessForMediaType"; "video" ) 	]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
Else If [
$status
= "Denied" ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Can't access camera" ; "Please go to system preferences, privacy and enable camera for FileMaker." ]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
Else If [
$status
= "Authorized" ]
# this is fine!
End If
Else If [
MBS
("IsWindows") ]
# nothing needed
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>If [ MBS("IsMacOS") ] 
	Set Variable [ $status ; Value: MBS( "AVRecorder.AuthorizationStatusForMediaType"; "video" ) ] 
	If [ $status = "NotDetermined" ] 
		Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS( "AVRecorder.RequestAccessForMediaType"; "video" ) 	] 
		Exit Script [ Text Result:    ] 
	Else If [ $status = "Denied" ] 
		Show Custom Dialog [ "Can't access camera" ; "Please go to system preferences, privacy and enable camera for FileMaker." ] 
		Exit Script [ Text Result:    ] 
	Else If [ $status = "Authorized" ] 
		# this is fine!
	End If
Else If [ MBS("IsWindows") ] 
	# nothing needed
End If</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.SetScreenInput
functions.signature: MBS( "AVRecorder.SetScreenInput"; AVSession { ; DisplayIndex; capturesCursor; capturesMouseClicks; cropRectLeft; cropRectBottom; cropRectWidth; cropRectHeight } )
functions.description: Sets video input to screen. cropRectLeft, cropRectBottom, cropRectWidth, cropRectHeight indicate the bounding rectangle of the screen area to be captured in pixels. Screen input captures the entire area of the display with which it is associated. To limit the capture rectangle to a subsection of the screen, set the cropRect property, which defines a smaller section of the screen in the screen's coordinate system. The origin (0,0) is the bottom-left corner of the screen. This function is not available for iOS as AVFoundation framework on iOS has no screen input class.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: DisplayIndex
parameters.description: The index of the screen. Derfault is zero for main screen.

parameters.name: capturesCursor
parameters.description: Whether the cursor should be rendered to the captured output. By default, screen input draws the cursor in its captured output. If this parameter is zero, the captured output contains only the windows on the screen. Cursor is omitted. Note that cursor position and mouse button state at the time of capture is preserved in CMSampleBuffers emitted from screen input.

parameters.name: capturesMouseClicks
parameters.description: Whether mouse clicks should be highlighted in the captured output. By default, screen input does not highlight mouse clicks in its captured output. If this parameter is 1, mouse clicks are highlighted (a circle is drawn around the mouse for the duration of the click) in the captured output.

functions.name: AVRecorder.SetVideoDevice
functions.description: Sets the video device to use. See AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount and AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo to learn what devices are available. If you have trouble with the resolution on Windows, please check the settings for the camera: Go to Settings in Windows Bluetooth & Devices Cameras Pick the camera in the list Advanced camera options -> Edit Turn on basic camera Change Media Type to e.g. 2560x1440. Apply Not all cameras may have such options. Our plugin usually picks the highest available resolution if available. Some cameras just use some default setting like 640x480. But you may be able to configure a higher resolution as default.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: Device
parameters.description: The device name, ID or index.

parameters.name: DesiredWidth
parameters.description: The pixel width you like to have. Only used on Windows to pick a specific resolution if available. Otherwise we usually pick highest available resolution.

parameters.name: DesiredHeight
parameters.description: The pixel height you like to have. Only used on Windows to pick a specific resolution if available. Otherwise we usually pick highest available resolution.

functions.name: AVRecorder.ShowPropertyDialog
functions.signature: MBS( "AVRecorder.ShowPropertyDialog"; AVSession; Object { ; WindowRef; X; Y } )
functions.description: Shows property dialog. You can use this function to show standard dialog for video device, audio device, encoder, stream configuration and others. Not all dialogs are supported.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: Object
parameters.description: Which object to ask for the dialog. Can be audioDevice, videodevice, encoder, VideoStreamConfig, AudioStreamConfig.

parameters.name: WindowRef
parameters.description: Parent window for dialog. Window Reference is the unique OS level window ID. You can obtain this by using the Window.FindByTitle or Window.FindByIndex functions. Pass zero to access the frontmost window.

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: X position relative to parent window.

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: Y position relative to parent window.

functions.name: AVRecorder.StartPreview
functions.description: Starts the preview.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Start preview:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow
";
$Session
; Get(WindowName); 50; 200; 320; 240)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("AVRecorder.StartPreview";
$Session
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.AddPreviewToWindow"; $Session; Get(WindowName); 50; 200; 320; 240)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StartPreview"; $Session)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Add preview to our layout:
examples.text_code:
# go to the right layout
Go to Layout [ “Webcam” (LiveStream) ; Animation: None ]
New Record/Request
# pause to actually show the new layout
Pause/Resume Script [ Duration (seconds): ,3 ]
# place preview on the control
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
AVRecorder.AddPreviewWithControl
";
$$SessionID
; 0; "Preview" ) ]
# Start video stream
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "AVRecorder.StartPreview";
$$sessionID
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> go to the right layout</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="SelectedLayout"/>
    <Layout id="99999" name="Webcam"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> pause to actually show the new layout</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,3 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> place preview on the control</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.AddPreviewWithControl"; $$SessionID; 0; "Preview" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Start video stream</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.StartPreview"; $$sessionID ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.StartQRCodeDetection
functions.description: Starts QRCode detection. Optionally, we can trigger script when a new barcode is detected. Parameter to the script is the session ID for the recording. If you need different detection, you can always get current frame with AVRecorder.CaptureStillPhoto and pass it to OCR.SetImage for text recognition or Barcode.Detect to find different barcodes. Added Windows support in version 15.4.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The database file name where the script is located.

parameters.name: ScriptName
parameters.description: The script to trigger if a barcode was detected.

examples.label: Start QRCode recognition:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("AVRecorder.StartQRCodeDetection";
AVRecorder::Session
; Get(FileName); "GotBarcode") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StartQRCodeDetection"; AVRecorder::Session; Get(FileName); "GotBarcode") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.StartRecording
functions.description: Starts recording. Please call AVRecorder.SetFilePath before to define where to put file.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Start Recording:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.SetFilePath
";
AVRecorder::Session
;
AVRecorder::FilePath
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Error";
$r
]
Exit Script []
End If
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("AVRecorder.StartRecording";
AVRecorder::Session
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Error";
$r
]
Exit Script []
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.SetFilePath"; AVRecorder::Session; AVRecorder::FilePath)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StartRecording"; AVRecorder::Session)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.StopQRCodeDetection

parameters.name: AVSession

functions.name: AVRecorder.StopRecording
functions.description: Stops recording. Currently on Mac the preview will continue (if enabled) and you can record again. On Windows it looks like you can only tear down session.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Stops recording:

<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.StopRecording"; $Session)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount
functions.description: Queries number of video devices found by the plugin. Calling this function will rebuild the device list, so you can query it with the other functions like AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo . This should find built-in webcam as well as external USB cameras.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

functions.name: AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo
functions.description: Queries details about video device.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: The index of the device from 0 to AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount -1 or the name or ID of the device.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: Which value to return. Can be ID, Name, Description, Index. On Mac can also be manufacturer, modelID, transportType, connected, inUseByAnotherApplication or suspended.

examples.label: Enumerate video devices:
examples.text_code:
# list video devices
Set Variable [
$count
; Value:
MBS
("
AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount
";
$recorder
)]
If [
$count
> 0]
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:0]
Loop
# next
New Record/Request
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Index
;
$index
]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::ID
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "ID")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Name
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "Name")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Description
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "Description")]
If [
MBS
("
SystemInfo.isMacOSX
")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Manufacturer
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "manufacturer")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::ModelID
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "modelID")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::TransportType
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "transportType")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Connected
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "connected")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::inUseByAnotherApplication
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "inUseByAnotherApplication")]
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::suspended
;
MBS
("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo";
$recorder
;
$index
; "suspended")]
End If
Set Field [
AVRecorder Devices::Type
; "Video"]
Commit Records/Requests []
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:
$index
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$count
=
$index
]
End Loop
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> list video devices</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceCount"; $recorder)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$count</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$count > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$index</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Index"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "ID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Name")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Name"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "Description")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Description"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("SystemInfo.isMacOSX")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "manufacturer")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Manufacturer"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "modelID")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="ModelID"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "transportType")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="TransportType"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "connected")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Connected"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "inUseByAnotherApplication")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="inUseByAnotherApplication"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("AVRecorder.VideoDeviceInfo"; $recorder; $index; "suspended")</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="suspended"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>"Video"</Calculation>
    <Field table="AVRecorder Devices" id="99999" name="Type"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$index + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$count = $index</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: AVRecorder.VideoResolutions
functions.description: Queries list of video resolution details for the selected camera. The JSON block returned may return information like Width and Height for each possible resolution. We may include more details and could add more if needed.

parameters.name: AVSession
parameters.description: The ID for the AVRecorder session as returned by AVRecorder.Init .

examples.label: Query list:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "AVRecorder.VideoResolutions"; $$AVSession ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$JSON</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CLibrary.GetTag
functions.description: Queries the tag value.

parameters.name: LibraryRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the library.

functions.name: CLibrary.List
functions.description: Lists all IDs of library objects. Returns IDs for all CLibrary objects in memory. If this list is growing, you may have forgotten to call CLibrary.Release in your scripts.

examples.label: List all object IDs:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CLibrary.List" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$list</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CLibrary.Load
functions.description: Loads a C library. Please make sure the library is for the platform and has matching 32/64bit size. This function requires a native path. Use Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath to convert a FileMaker path to a native path if required. If you like to have the user choose the path, you can use FileDialog functions. For Server be aware that server has limited permissions and may not be able to access all files on a computer.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description: The library name/path. Can be a name and the system will look in library search path. Or full path for some custom library.

functions.result: Returns library reference number or error.

examples.label: Load zlib:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CLibrary.Load"; "/usr/lib/libz.1.dylib" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Load SQLite library manually on macOS:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CLibrary.Load"; "/usr/lib/libsqlite3.dylib" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$library</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CLibrary.LoadFunction
functions.description: Loads a function from a library. You need to pass a signature to the function parameters and return types. Signature has format of parameters in brackets and return type attached. e.g. if function takes an integer and a 32-bit float and returns a boolean, you would declare it as "(if)B". For array Parameters, please use p for pointer. If needed, you can prefix signature with a calling convention prefix.

parameters.name: LibraryRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the library.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the function. Please see CLibrary.Symbols to get a list of available symbol names.

parameters.name: Signature
parameters.description: The signature text.

functions.result: Returns function reference number or error.

examples.label: Load zlibVersion function:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CLibrary.LoadFunction"; $lib; "zlibVersion"; "()Z" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CLibrary.Name
functions.description: Queries name of the library. May return the path used to load the library. This function checks for a license. Created 25th April 2020 , last changed 25th April 2020 CLibrary.LoadFunction - CLibrary.Release 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: LibraryRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the library.

functions.name: CLibrary.Release
functions.description: Releases the library and all memory used for it. Please call this when you are done with a library.

parameters.name: LibraryRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the library.

functions.name: CLibrary.ReleaseAll
functions.description: Frees all libraries. Be aware that on a server this may free objects, which are used by other scripts running in parallel!

examples.label: Cleanup:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
CFunction.ReleaseAll
" ) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "CLibrary.ReleaseAll" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CFunction.ReleaseAll" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CLibrary.ReleaseAll" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CLibrary.SetTag
functions.description: Sets the tag value. The tag value allows you to store any value related to the library here like a RecordID in FileMaker.

parameters.name: LibraryRef

parameters.name: Value

functions.name: Encryption.Cipher
functions.signature: MBS( "Encryption.Cipher"; Direction; Algorithm; KeyType; KeyData; KeyEncoding; InputType; InputData; InputEncoding; OutputType { ; OutputInfo; IVType; IVData; IVEncoding; Padding } )
functions.description: Encrypts or decrypts of a value. Input can be one of different types: Text, you pass "text", your text and the text encoding. If no or invalid encoding name is passed, the native one is used. The encoding can be one of the following strings: ansi, windows, mac, latin1, utf8, dos or native. PDF, you pass the container with the PDF file inside. Image, you pass the container with an image file. Data, you pass container and plugin looks for the file data inside. Hex, you pass a hex encoded text. Base64, you pass a base64 encoded text. Path, you pass the file path to a file to read. Container, you pass a container which is serialized with all its content. JPEG, a container with a JPEG image. GIF, a container with a GIF image. TIFF, a container with a TIFF image. PNG, a container with a PNG image. Now for output we can return the data in various ways: Text, we return the data as text in the encoding. This is not recommended for encrypted data. OutputInfo parameter is text encoding. Base64, the data is returned as base64 encoded text. Hex, the data is returned as hex encoded text. File, the data is returned as a container value with a file inside containing the data. OutputInfo parameter is the filename to be stored in the container value. Path, the data is written to a file. In the OutputInfo parameter you provide a native file path. Container, the data is unpacked as a container value (serialized container). GIF, the data is returned as a container with GIF image inside. TIFF, the data is returned as a container with TIFF image inside. JPEG, the data is returned as a container with JPEG image inside. PNG, the data is returned as a container with PNG image inside. PDF, the data is returned as a container with PDF document inside. Auto, only for returning data and detecting type by provided file name. (new in 7.3) Possible ciphers: AES-128-CFB, BF-CBC, BF-CFB, BF-ECB, BF-OFB, AES-128-CBC, id-aes128-CCM, AES-128-CFB1, AES-128-CFB8, AES-128-CTR, AES-128-ECB, id-aes128-GCM, AES-128-OFB, AES-128-XTS, AES-192-CBC, id-aes192-CCM, AES-192-CFB1, AES-192-CFB8, AES-192-CFB, AES-192-CTR, AES-192-ECB, id-aes192-GCM, AES-192-OFB, AES-256-CBC, id-aes256-CCM, AES-256-CFB1, AES-256-CFB8, AES-256-CFB, AES-256-CTR, AES-256-ECB, id-aes256-GCM, AES-256-OFB, AES-256-XTS, CAMELLIA-128-CBC, CAMELLIA-128-CFB1, CAMELLIA-128-CFB8, CAMELLIA-128-CFB, CAMELLIA-128-ECB, CAMELLIA-128-OFB, CAMELLIA-192-CBC, CAMELLIA-192-CFB1, CAMELLIA-192-CFB8, CAMELLIA-192-CFB, CAMELLIA-192-ECB, CAMELLIA-192-OFB, CAMELLIA-256-CBC, CAMELLIA-256-CFB1, CAMELLIA-256-CFB8, CAMELLIA-256-CFB, CAMELLIA-256-ECB, CAMELLIA-256-OFB, CAST5-CBC, CAST5-CFB, CAST5-ECB, CAST5-OFB, DES-EDE, DES-EDE-CBC, DES-EDE-CFB, DES-EDE, DES-EDE-OFB, DES-EDE3, DES-EDE3-CBC, DES-EDE3-CFB1, DES-EDE3-CFB8, DES-EDE3-CFB, DES-EDE3, DES-EDE3-OFB, RC2-40-CBC, RC2-64-CBC, RC2-CBC, RC2-CFB, RC2-ECB, RC2-OFB, RC4, RC4-40, RC4-HMAC-MD5, IDEA-CFB, IDEA-ECB, IDEA-OFB, IDEA-CBC, DES-CFB1, DES-CFB8, DES-CFB, DES-OFB, DES-ECB, DES-CBC or  DESX-CBC. Please use right key length. For AES 128bit you need a 128 bit key, which means 16 bytes length. For AES 256 you need a 32byte long key. Recommended way is to use a hash function like SHA 256 to get a hashed version of your password plus some extra text as salt. For 128bit, you can simply use first half of SHA 256. Version 7.3 reports an error if key size doesn’t match. Keys and IV are extended with NULL bytes to reach minimum size if needed. For PDF content: If you have a DynaPDF Pro license and DynaPDF functions initialized, this function can add previews for the PDF file on Windows and Linux. For MacOS, we make them with PDFKit.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Whether to encrypt or decrypt. Pass encrypt or decrypt.

parameters.name: Algorithm
parameters.description: Which algorithm to use. Can be for example RC2, blowfish, AES128, AES192, AES256.

parameters.name: KeyType
parameters.description: The type of input for key. Can be Text, Container, Image, Path, PDF, Data, base64 or Hex.

parameters.name: KeyData
parameters.description: The actual input data for the key. Text, container or file path. Must not be longer than the maximum key length of the given algorithm. If key is too short, we pad it with zero bytes. If the key is text, please check what type of line ending you use and whether to trim the key. For short keys, we may fill them up with zeros to default/minimum length.

parameters.name: KeyEncoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text input. Parameter is ignored for other cases. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: InputType
parameters.description: The type of input. Can be Text, Container, Image, Path, PDF, Data, base64 or Hex.

parameters.name: InputData
parameters.description: The actual input data. Text, container or file path.

parameters.name: InputEncoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text input. Parameter is ignored for other cases. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: OutputType
parameters.description: The output type. Can be Base64, Hex, Text, File, Path. Can be Auto in plugin version 7.3 to detect type for container from OutputInfo parameter. Added Base64URL as option for plugin version 10.3.

parameters.name: OutputInfo
parameters.description: The addition info for output. For text it is the text encoding, for file container the file name and for path the actual native file path.

parameters.name: IVType
parameters.description: The type of input. Can be Text, Container, Image, Path, PDF, Data, base64 or Hex. In version 6.0 and newer you can pass Input here to take IV from input data.

parameters.name: IVData
parameters.description: The actual input data for the IV. Text, container or file path. Must not be longer than the maximum IV length of the given algorithm. If IV is too short, we pad it with zero bytes.

parameters.name: IVEncoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text input. Parameter is ignored for other cases. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: Padding
parameters.description: Whether to use padding. Pass 1 to enable padding (default). Pass 0 to disable.

examples.label: Encrypts some text with AES:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Encryption.Cipher"; "encrypt"; "AES-128-CFB"; "Text"; "Test Key 1234567"; "UTF-8"; "Text"; "Hello World"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Encrypt and decrypt:
examples.text_code:
# encrypt something
$r
=
MBS
("Encryption.Cipher"; "encrypt"; "AES-128-CFB"; "Text"; "Secret"; "UTF-8"; "Text"; "Input Text"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "" )
# returns "C577EC9EBE28B1F4E1FD"
# and backward
$r
=
MBS
("Encryption.Cipher"; "decrypt"; "AES-128-CFB"; "Text"; "Secret"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "C577EC9EBE28B1F4E1FD"; ""; "Text"; "UTF-8" )
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> encrypt something</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Encryption.Cipher"; "encrypt"; "AES-128-CFB"; "Text"; "Secret"; "UTF-8"; "Text"; "Input Text"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> returns "C577EC9EBE28B1F4E1FD"</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and backward</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Encryption.Cipher"; "decrypt"; "AES-128-CFB"; "Text"; "Secret"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "C577EC9EBE28B1F4E1FD"; ""; "Text"; "UTF-8" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Encrypt with AES 256bit Counter (CTR) mode:
examples.text_code:
# Make a 256 bit key with a hash
Set Variable [
$hash
; Value:
MBS
( "
Hash.Digest
"; "SHA256"; "Text"; "My Secret Password"; "UTF-8"; "Hex" )]
# now encrypt some text
Set Variable [
$encrypted
; Value:
MBS
( "Encryption.Cipher"; "encrypt"; "AES-256-CTR"; "Hex";
$hash
; ""; "Text"; "Hello World"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "" )]
# and show encrypted text
Show Custom Dialog [
$encrypted
]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Make a 256 bit key with a hash</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Hash.Digest"; "SHA256"; "Text"; "My Secret Password"; "UTF-8"; "Hex" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$hash</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> now encrypt some text</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Encryption.Cipher"; "encrypt"; "AES-256-CTR"; "Hex"; $hash; ""; "Text"; "Hello World"; "UTF-8"; "Hex"; "" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$encrypted</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and show encrypted text</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>$encrypted</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation/>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: FSEvents.Create
functions.description: Creates a new FSEvents monitor. Works on server and client. May not work for network shared disks as most drivers don't pass through change events. Flag values: NoDefer = 2 Affects the meaning of the latency parameter. If you specify this flag and more than latency seconds have elapsed since the last event, your app will receive the event immediately. The delivery of the event resets the latency timer and any further events will be delivered after latency seconds have elapsed. This flag is useful for apps that are interactive and want to react immediately to changes but avoid getting swamped by notifications when changes are occurringin rapid succession. If you do not specify this flag, then when an event occurs after a period of no events, the latency timer is started. Any events that occur during the next latency seconds will be delivered as one group (including that first event). The delivery of the group of events resets the latency timer and any further events will be delivered after latency seconds. This is the default behavior and is more appropriate for background, daemon or batch processing apps. WatchRoot = 4 Request notifications of changes along the path to the path(s) you're watching. For example, with this flag, if you watch "/foo/bar" and it is renamed to "/foo/bar.old", you would receive a RootChanged event. The same is true if the directory "/foo" were renamed. The event you receive is a special event: the path for the event is the original path you specified, the flag kFSEventStreamEventFlagRootChanged is set and event ID is zero. RootChanged events are useful to indicate that you should rescan a particular hierarchy because it changed completely (as opposed to the things inside of it changing). If you want to track the current location of a directory, it is best to open the directory before creating the stream so that you have a file descriptor for it and can issue an F_GETPATH fcntl() to find the current path. IgnoreSelf = 8 Don't send events that were triggered by the current process. This is useful for reducing the volume of events that are sent. It is only useful if your process might modify the file system hierarchy beneath the path(s) being monitored. Note: this has no effect on historical events, i.e., those delivered before the HistoryDone sentinel event.  Also, this does not apply to RootChanged events because the WatchRoot feature uses a separate mechanism that is unable to provide information about the responsible process. FileEvents = 16 Request file-level notifications.  Your stream will receive events about individual files in the hierarchy you're watching instead of only receiving directory level notifications.  Use this flag with care as it will generate significantly more events than without it. MarkSel = 32 Tag events that were triggered by the current process with the "OwnEvent" flag. This is only useful if your process might modify the file system hierarchy beneath the path(s) being monitored and you wish to know which events were triggered by your process. Note: this has no effect on historical events, i.e., those delivered before the HistoryDone sentinel event. This function requires a native path. Use Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath to convert a FileMaker path to a native path if required. If you like to have the user choose the path, you can use FileDialog functions. For Server be aware that server has limited permissions and may not be able to access all files on a computer.

parameters.name: PathList
parameters.description: List of folders to watch. (or just one path)

parameters.name: sinceWhen
parameters.description: The event ID from where to start. Can be the latest ID you saw last time or you pass "now" to start with now.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: The flags. Can be a combination of NoDefer, WatchRoot, IgnoreSelf, FileEvents or MarkSelf.

parameters.name: Latency
parameters.description: The latency.

examples.label: Initializes FSEvents:
examples.text_code:
Delete All Records [No dialog]
Set Variable [
$path
; Value:
MBS
( "
Folders.UserDesktop
" )]
Set Variable [
$sinceWhen
; Value:"now"]
If [not IsEmpty(
FSEvents::LastID
)]
Set Variable [
$sinceWhen
; Value:
FSEvents::LastID
]
End If
Set Variable [
$fstream
; Value:
MBS
("FSEvents.Create";
$path
;
$sinceWhen
; "IgnoreSelf, FileEvents, WatchRoot"; 2)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Error"; "Failed to create file system event monitor."]
Else
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
FSEvents.SetFileName
";
$fstream
; Get(FileName))]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
FSEvents.SetScriptName
";
$fstream
; "FSEventsNotification")]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
FSEvents.Start
";
$fstream
)]
If [
$r
= 1]
Set Field [
FSEvents::StreamRef
;
$fstream
]
Else
Show Custom Dialog ["Error"; "Failed to start file system event monitor."]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
FSEvents.Release
";
$fstream
)]
End If
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="10" name="Delete All Records">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Folders.UserDesktop" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"now"</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sinceWhen</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>not IsEmpty(FSEvents::LastID)</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>FSEvents::LastID</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sinceWhen</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("FSEvents.Create"; $path; $sinceWhen; "IgnoreSelf, FileEvents, WatchRoot"; 2)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$fstream</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"Failed to create file system event monitor."</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("FSEvents.SetFilename"; $fstream; Get(FileName))</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("FSEvents.SetScriptName"; $fstream; "FSEventsNotification")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("FSEvents.Start"; $fstream)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$r = 1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$fstream</Calculation>
    <Field table="FSEvents" id="99999" name="StreamRef"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"Failed to start file system event monitor."</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("FSEvents.Release"; $fstream)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: FSEvents.CreateRelativeToDevice
functions.signature: MBS( "FSEvents.CreateRelativeToDevice"; DeviceID; PathList; sinceWhen { ; Flags; Latency } )
functions.description: Creates a new FSEvents monitor relative to a device. You can only pass one path in the pathList. Pass empty text there to watch the root of the device.

parameters.name: DeviceID
parameters.description: The device ID. Either a number or the path to a file/folder of that device.

parameters.name: PathList
parameters.description: List of folders to watch. (or just one path)

parameters.name: sinceWhen
parameters.description: The event ID from where to start. Can be the latest ID you saw last time or you pass "now" to start with now.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: The flags. Can be a combination of NoDefer, WatchRoot, IgnoreSelf, FileEvents or MarkSelf.

parameters.name: Latency
parameters.description: The latency.

    </Repetition>

  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>
